entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting SAP Certification discount code for special programs
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

Hi David,

I hope you're doing well. I've tried all the methods to redeem my campaign code, but I keep getting the error message, "Campaign code could not be added." I've attached a screenshot for your reference.

Could you please assist me with this issue? Let me know if you need any additional information.

Thanks in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Baskar K.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David.

I have completed the course Develop Applications Running on SAP BTP Using SAP HANA Cloud for certification SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP HANA Cloud 1.0

I really love working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a big difference. I want to keep learning and growing in this field to have a great career.

 

Thanks & Regards,

 Trong

entry.title: Re: Advanced Returns Management Logistical Follow-up document not created
entry.content:
Hi, I guess you just save the inpection results. You must push the button "save and confirm".

 

For more information check the Fiori App Library: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('MSR_INSPWH')/S22OP

"You can save your data with or without confirming the logistical follow-up activities. If you just save the data, the system creates the inspection documents but does not create any logistical follow-up documents. You can still change the data at this point. If you confirm a logistical follow-up activity, the system creates the relevant logistical follow-up documents in the background."

entry.title: Google pay wrong transaction refund money
entry.content: Contact :-Google Pay customer support: You can call Google Pay customer support directly at +91815-904-6274(U.S.) or + 815-904-6274./ (India). Explain the situation to the customer service representative and ask for their assistance in recovering the funds..

entry.title: Re: Element "timestamp" is not available in my ABAP CDS V...
entry.content:
@Henry_Hill : I see that the annotation @Analytics.dataExtraction.enabled: true is missing. Could you please add this and check.

what is the error you are getting? Is it possible to provide the name of the table which are having these date and time fields.

entry.title: Re: Contract Release Orders
entry.content:
Hi,

To get all released documents (POs) related to one contract, may use the Fiori App.

"Manage Purchas Contracts"

add the contract no. then will get list of all POs

entry.title: Why i can insert records into standart table?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.

I've created an z program and try to add values into mara table.

Why values are adding without 'commit work' statement?

Is it should work like that?

data : ls_line type mara.
ls_line-matnr = '0000-00000-00000'.
insert into mara VALUES ls_line.

 Does 'commit work' starts only updates parts or it should be here too?
